title: quercus toza var. humilis
intro: Quercus toza var. humilis, also known as the Himalayan dwarf oak, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Quercus genus, characterized by its compact growth and small leaves. The medicinal properties of Quercus toza var. humilis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Quercus toza var. humilis include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
